function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0006
alias: helios_backfill_intake_audit
issued_on: 2025-12-11
total_eur: 520
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 520
---
# Helios intake audit invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0006                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_intake_audit   |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-11                     |
| total_eur      | 520                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 2   | 260      | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from the first phase when the work was mostly diagnosis and process-mapping.

next_step.current_state: Invoice OCR write succeeded. Reactive outbox check is not applicable to this finance record update; proceeding with second requested OCR update.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write purchase record with schema frontmatter preserving exact body
next_step.observation: First target invoice file was updated successfully with YAML frontmatter and preserved body.

project: Studio Parts Library

    quantity: 2

    line_eur: 52

---

function.message: Completed the next inbound request by running the two specified finance docs through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to both target records while preserving each original note body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, preserved original bodies during frontmatter migration, and removed inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR two specified finance documents. Both notes contained all required visible fields and line items for the finance schema, enabling complete frontmatter extraction without guessing. Updates were applied in place and inbox cleanup performed as directed by inbox-processing workflows.
completed_steps_laconic: read target invoice and purchase files
